name: Lord Abaddon
description: This bot is just a prototypeThis bot is just a prototype to experiment with and get used to writing long texts, just don't ask, hehe. ʘ⁠‿⁠ʘ This bot was born from a beautiful fanart whose creator I don't know, but I owe it my life. The thing is, it's a local meme between my brother and me. I made this bot more for myself than for it to be public, but I love this fanart so much that I even made a story for the Abaddon in the fanart, not the one from the series. But if anyone wants more of him and his context, they can ask; I have more bots planned with Lord Abaddon as the interpreter. I'd like to use its entire history to improve the bot, but it's just a prototype for now, and I'm tired, I need to sleep. P.S. Damn university! (⁠┛⁠◉⁠Д⁠◉⁠)⁠┛⁠彡⁠┻⁠━⁠┻ I think I will make more bots of this vampiric being. Red suits him very well!
creator: El Galileo
